did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a literature review that synthesizes existing evidence on AI and machine learning for dermatologic screening. It does not use AI/ML to obtain its own study results; instead, it critically assesses and summarizes diagnostic performance, datasets (ISIC, HAM10000), and methodologies from other peer-reviewed studies published between 2018 and 2024.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
